Stock/Air Cooler.description: Bundled or budget air coolers using a heatsink and single fan. Sufficient for non-overclocked, lower-TDP CPUs.

coolers.name: AMD Wraith Stealth (Stock/Bundled)
coolers.desc: AMD's bundled stock cooler for Ryzen 5000 series 65W chips. Perfectly adequate for non-overclocked builds with moderate workloads, but offers no overclocking headroom and gets audibly loud under sustained heavy load.

coolers.name: Cooler Master Hyper 212 Black Edition
coolers.desc: The most iconic budget aftermarket cooler of the past decade - massively popular for good reason, handling mid-range CPUs like the i5-13400F or Ryzen 5 7600 comfortably while keeping temps well in check.
cons: Can be tall - check case clearance

High-End Air Cooler.description: Dual-tower or large single-tower air coolers capable of handling higher-TDP CPUs and moderate overclocking, often a quieter and more reliable alternative to AIO liquid coolers.

coolers.name: Noctua NH-D15
coolers.desc: Widely regarded as the best air cooler available, capable of matching or beating many 240mm AIO liquid coolers while remaining near-silent. A favorite for builders who distrust AIO pump longevity and want a 'fit and forget' solution.
pros: No pump failure risk like AIOs
cons: Very large - check RAM and case clearance
Premium price for an air cooler

AIO Liquid Cooler.description: All-in-one closed-loop liquid coolers, the standard choice for high-TDP flagship CPUs (i9, Ryzen 9, Core Ultra 9) and overclocked builds. Available in 240mm, 280mm, and 360mm radiator sizes.

coolers.name: Corsair iCUE H100i Elite Capellix (240mm)
coolers.desc: A reliable, well-reviewed 240mm AIO suited for CPUs like the i5-13600K or Ryzen 7 7700X. RGB pump head and software control add aesthetic appeal for showcase builds without breaking the budget on cooling.
pros: Good cooling for mid-high TDP CPUs
cons: Pump has a finite lifespan vs air coolers

coolers.name: ARCTIC Liquid Freezer III 360
coolers.desc: Exceptional price-to-performance in the 360mm AIO category, capable of handling the most demanding flagship CPUs like the i9-14900K or Ryzen 9 9950X3D even under sustained all-core loads during rendering or compilation.
pros: Outstanding cooling performance for the price
VRM fan on pump block aids motherboard cooling
cons: Large radiator needs case clearance check
Pump noise audible under heavy load
